DiveSites.heading: Punta Cana Dive Sites — Depths & Highlights
DiveSites.intro: Dive sites are selected daily based on weather, sea conditions, and visibility to give you the best possible experience.

Footer.developedBy: Web Development in the Dominican Republic

TrustLine.line: ★ {rating} · {count} Google reviews · Verified PADI Dive Center #27147

SelectionComponent.discoverTheUnderwaterWorld: Discover the underwater world with our internationally certified instructors. From beginners to advanced divers, we offer courses for all levels.
SelectionComponent.saveWithOurValuePackedDivePackages: Save with our value-packed dive packages designed for certified divers. Multi-day adventures to Punta Cana's premier dive locations.
SelectionComponent.exploreTheStunningIslandsOfTheDominicanR: Explore the stunning islands of the Dominican Republic with our full-day excursions. Perfect for everyone.

CourseCards.discoverScubaDiving: For those who have never tried scuba diving before!
CourseCards.scubaDiver: Dive under the direct supervision of a PADI professional to a maximum depth of 12 meters / 40 feet
CourseCards.openWaterDiver: Dive anywhere in the world with a certified buddy!
CourseCards.advancedOpenWaterDiver: Take it to the next level!
CourseCards.sharkConservationDiver: Experience thrilling shark dives while learning safety, behavior, and conservation skills.
CourseCards.enrichedAirNitrox: Extend dive time and reduce surface intervals with enriched air diving
CourseCards.wreckDiver: Explore sunken ships and underwater history with the wreck diver course.
CourseCards.deepDiver: Explore deeper dive sites safely with the PADI Deep Diver course
CourseCards.peakPerformanceBuoyancy: Master buoyancy control for smoother, more efficient and enjoyable dives.

booking.disclaimer: No payment now. We'll confirm availability and send a deposit link.
booking.successBody: Thanks {name} — we'll confirm your dive by email and text shortly. See you underwater.

detail.galleryHeading: A glimpse of what you'll see
detail.ctaBody: Reserve your spot with a 50% deposit. We'll confirm your dates and send everything you need to prepare.

SharkDive.heroSubtitle: An adventure that takes your diving to the next level — encounter nurse, blacktip, and reef sharks in their natural habitat, led by experienced instructors.
SharkDive.galleryHeading: Face to face with the ocean's apex predators
SharkDive.ctaHeading: Ready for the dive of a lifetime?
SharkDive.ctaBody: Book your shark diving tour with Grand Bay of the Sea today and experience the thrill of diving with sharks in Punta Cana.

Trips.tripDayHeading: What a trip day looks like
Trips.tripDayIntro: From hotel doorstep to the last dive, everything's handled so you can focus on the water.
Trips.ctaHeading: Make it a day to remember
Trips.ctaBody: Trips run on select days and fill quickly. Tell us your dates and we'll reserve your spot with a deposit.
